sources.name: NHSE / DHSC
sources.dataset: Overseas Visitors and Migrant NHS Cost Recovery Programme

sources.name: NHS England
sources.dataset: Overseas visitor cost recovery: implementation plan update

sources.name: National Audit Office
sources.dataset: NHS cost recovery for overseas visitors

metadata.methodology: Cost recovery figures are drawn from the DHSC annual cost recovery programme reports and NHS England implementation data. Identification rates reflect the proportion of chargeable overseas visitors correctly identified at point of NHS contact. Debt write-off figures are from trust-level returns to NHSE. All figures are for England only. The 2020 figure reflects reduced international travel during COVID-19 and a temporary suspension of charging for COVID-related treatment.
knownIssues: 2020 figures depressed by COVID-19 travel restrictions and suspension of charging for COVID treatment
Identification rate methodology changed in 2017 when the overseas visitor charging regulations were amended
Total estimated cost of overseas visitor NHS use is uncertain — NAO estimated it at £1.8bn in 2016, but this figure has not been formally updated
